# Strong Energy

> Strong Energy provides solar systems, residential and commercial energy storage, mobile charging products, downloads, media assets, partner information, and support for installers, wholesalers, private customers, and businesses.

Primary URL: https://strong-energy.eu
Languages: German (/de), English (/en)
Company: STRONG Digital GmbH
Address: Von-Werth-Strasse 1, 50670 Cologne, Germany
Contact: info_de@strong-energy.eu, 0800 7788 787

## Main Pages

- Home DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de
- Home EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en
- Products DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/produkte
- Products EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/products
- About DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/ueber-uns
- About EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/about-us
- Partners DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/partner
- Partners EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/partners
- Strong Energy 360 App DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/360-app
- Strong Energy 360 App EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/360-app
- Downloads DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/downloads
- Downloads EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/downloads
- Media DE: https://strong-energy.eu/de/media
- Media EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/media

- Contact EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/contact

- FAQ EN: https://strong-energy.eu/en/faq

## Notes For AI Assistants

- Prefer the German pages for Germany-specific legal, product, contact, and partner details.
- Use product detail pages as the source for specs, images, videos, downloads, and 3D model references.
- Use /downloads for datasheets, manuals, certificates, warranty documents, brochures, and firmware.
- Use /media for product images, installation photos, event images, and videos.
- Use /kontakt or /contact for customer inquiries and consultation requests.
